description: From the manufacturer POLYESTER THREAD: Polyester thread offers more elasticity and strength than alternative natural threads and cottons, and promises ‘no shrinkage’. The thread has excellent colour fastness, keeping a consistent colour after washing MANY USES: Suitable for machine and hand sewing, the Korbond Black and White Thread Pack can be used with many fabric types, including cotton, leather, PU, synthetics, knits and stretch fabrics. VALUE PACK: Great value pack including sewing essentials and accessories EFFORTLESS THREADING: Features a needle threader for easy and quick needle setup. Tackle sewing tasks with finesse and precision using the Korbond Black and White Polyester Thread Set This comprehensive set includes everything you need to dive into your sewing projects effortlessly. Crafted for convenience and reliability, this kit boasts 100 meters each of black and white polyester threads, catering to a myriad of sewing needs. Repair garments, embark on creative stitching projects, or bring your craft ideas to life—this set offers versatility and durability. Polyester thread brings forth a multitude of benefits, ensuring your stitches hold strong and endure wear and tear without compromising on flexibility. Its resilience makes it an ideal choice for various materials, from delicate fabrics to heavy-duty textiles, ensuring a seamless sewing experience. But what truly sets this set apart is how it is user-friendly The inclusion of three hand sewing needles of varying sizes provides versatility for different types of projects and fabrics. The needles, meticulously crafted for durability and ease of use, ensure smooth stitching experiences every time. Set Contains 100m Black Thread 100m White Thread 3 Hand Sewing Needles 1 Needle Threader Easy Threading The highlight of this kit is the needle threader, designed to simplify the often-fiddly task of threading needles. Say goodbye to squinting and struggling to thread your needle with precision—the needle threader effortlessly guides the thread through the eye of the needle, saving you time and frustration. This innovative addition makes this set an ideal choice for beginners and seasoned sewers alike, enhancing the joy of sewing without the hassle.
